calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Dec-07-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Irina Meyers, 415-310-7036, Defendant in Pro Per.
No other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. Defendant informs the Court the other side will not be appearing. Defendant submits bank statements to the Court.(as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

Taken Under submission. (as fully reported in the reporter's ranscript) The Court will prepare an order.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
